revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-355

A short metal cylinder with a head at one end, the other end being passed through a pre-drilled hole in two parts to be joined. The end is subsequently spread by the action of a compressing tool to form a rigid connection.

{{IALAFooter}}
